claims.claim: OpenAI's annualized revenue run rate hit $30B in late April 2026, up from $25B in March.
claims.speaker: The Information (via newsletter)
claims.comparison_note: Updates ledger ARR of $25B to $30B based on more recent April 2026 data.
claims.source_excerpt:
The State of AI Provider Economics — May 2026

OpenAI's revenue trajectory continues to surprise even bullish observers. According
to The Information, OpenAI's annualized revenue run rate hit $**30**B in late April
2026 — up sharply from the $25B figure that circulated in March. The growth is
being driven primarily by enterprise ChatGPT seats, which now account for roughly
42% of revenue.

Google parent Alphabet, which has guided to $75B of full-year capex for 2026, told
investors on its Q1 call that it now expects total capex to land closer to $**90**B
for the year — driven by additional AI accelerator orders.

- Mistral's H1 2026 revenue ran at $250M, doubling from H2 2025 levels.
